description: Directional pushing tasks for C3 greedy-contact-mode testing. Task ID selects goal direction; all other task parameters are inherited from tasks.yaml -> pushing.

1.name: north
1.description: Push box 30cm north. Arm prepositioned on west face: testing whether vanilla C3 can push orthogonally to the active contact normal.

2.name: east
2.description: Push box 30cm east. Arm prepositioned on west face: contact normal aligned with goal direction. Baseline case.

3.name: south
3.description: Push box 30cm south. Arm prepositioned on west face: testing C3 with orthogonal goal (opposite north).

4.name: west
4.description: Push box 30cm west. Arm prepositioned on west face: contact normal anti-aligned with goal direction. Pusher would have to go through the box -- impossible without contact mode switch.
